# cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_data_tag_category (Resource)

Accepted Permissions

- `Zero Trust Read`
- `Zero Trust Write`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_data_tag_category" "example_zero_trust_dlp_data_tag_category" {
  account_id = "account_id"
  name = "name"
  description = "description"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `tags` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `template_id` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_data_tag_category.example '<account_id>/<category_id>'
```
